generated.description: End-to-end pipeline for Parameter Golf lane_3: data flows from training data into a float32 teacher model and a student model that undergoes staged QAT. generated.description: Diagram of the compression-teacher distillation setup (Hypothesis 1). generated.description: Flowchart for compression-biased stochastic gating (Hypothesis 2). Steps: (1) periodically sample a minibatch, quantize per-channel activations, and pass channel-wise bytes through zlib to get bpb_c; (2) update EMA statistics h_c for each channel/head; (3) for each training step, compute p_drop(c) from h_c relative to the mean compressibility, sample binary gates g_c, and apply them to activations; (4) in inference, all gates fixed to 1 (no gating). Include annotations that this operates only during QAT, does not change the deployed graph, and consumes sparse zlib calls.

Figure description: Flowchart for compression-biased stochastic gating (Hypothesis 2). Steps: (1) periodically sample a minibatch, quantize per-channel activations, and pass channel-wise bytes through zlib to get bpb_c; (2) update EMA statistics h_c for each channel/head; (3) for each training step, compute p_drop(c) from h_c relative to the mean compressibility, sample binary gates g_c, and apply them to activations; (4) in inference, all gates fixed to 1 (no gating). Include annotations that this operates only during QAT, does not change the deployed graph, and consumes sparse zlib calls.
